series_metadata.series_title: Capital Projects-Construction Contractors' Bid, Award and Pre-Construction Compliance Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Contains legal notices and advertisements, correspondence and other related documents regarding competitive bidding for construction of Department of Natural Resources capital projects. Includes original bid documents (specifications and drawings), addendums to the project, requests for bids, received bids, notices of awards, notices of commencement, and similar documents. Also includes Encouraging Diversity in Growth and Equity (EDGE) certifications, Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) certifications, Equal Employment Opportunity/Affirmative Action (EEO/AA) certifications, Drug Free Workplace certifications, tax exempt certifications, prevailing wage compliance certifications, bid schedules, and additional pre-construction documentation required for the commencement of construction.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: a project's financial close. ; Paper: project's financial close or saved in an electronic format. Once scanned an electronic format, paper copy may be shredded
